text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bull's-eye! I knew ya could do it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: My little sisters are gonna love this! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just imagining their happy faces is enough to get
me smilin' too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a million! This is shapin' up to be a great
day!
